ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the user */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Status indicating if the account is active */,
  "updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the user record was last updated */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the record was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "failed_login_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of failed login attempts */,
  "account_locked" INTEGER /* Status indicating if the account is locked */,
  "locale" TEXT /* User's preferred locale */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* User's preferred timezone */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_profiles" (
  "profile_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each profile */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user associated with this profile */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* User's first name */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* User's last name */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Short biography or description of the user */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* User's phone number */,
  "address" TEXT /* User's address */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("profile_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_profiles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who performed the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Description of the activity performed (e.g., login, update profile) */,
  "activity_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the activity occurred */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the user's browser or device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., admin, user) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role's responsibilities and permissions */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-role association */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role assigned to the user */,
  "assigned_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the role was assigned */,
  "expires_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the role expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "passwords" (
  "password_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each password record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user associated with this password */,
  "hashed_password" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_changed" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the password was last changed */,
  "password_reset_expires_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the password reset expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("password_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passwords_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user associated with the session */,
  "session_token" TEXT /* Session token for authentication */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the session was created */,
  "expires_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the session expires */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the user's browser or device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "sent_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the notification was sent */,
  "read_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the notification was read */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "password_resets" (
  "reset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each password reset request */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user requesting the reset */,
  "reset_token" TEXT /* Reset token issued for password reset */,
  "requested_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the password reset was requested */,
  "expires_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the password reset expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_password_resets_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user associated with the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., login, logout, error) */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the event */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the event occurred */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the user's browser or device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tokens" (
  "token_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each token */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user associated with the token */,
  "token" TEXT /* Token for authentication */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the token was created */,
  "expires_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the token expires */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of token (e.g., access, refresh) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("token_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tokens_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "integrations" (
  "integration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each integration */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user associated with the integration */,
  "service" TEXT /* Name of the integrated service (e.g., Facebook, Google) */,
  "access_token" TEXT /* Access token for the integrated service */,
  "refresh_token" TEXT /* Refresh token for the integrated service */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the integration was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the integration was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("integration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_integrations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
